creator: keramida@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, 19 Apr 2009 21:06:25 GMT, Panagiotis Christias <p.christias@noc.ntua.gr> wrote:
> The current version of the FreeBSD Project favicon (*) has only 256
> colors and no alpha channel transparency. As a result, it looks
> somewhat choppy in every modern web browser.
>
> * http://www.freebsd.org/favicon.ico
>   http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/www/en/favicon.ico

> I have prepared a new 24 bit version of the FreeBSD Project
> favicon. It is available at:
>
> http://noc.ntua.gr/~christia/freebsd-favicon-24bit.ico
>
> Feel free to use it as you wish.

Any objections from other freebsd-www people?

The new icon does look much better, so if there is no serious reason why
we can't replace it, I'd like to commit the icon submitted by Panagiotis.
